# UX Checklist: Enter Latitude/Longitude to Estimate Property Value

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for the coordinate estimate flow.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/002-uc02-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all user-visible UI states specified for valid submission, invalid input, out-of-boundary, and partial data? [Completeness, Spec §Main Flow, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [ ] CHK002 Are coordinate precision requirements (5 decimal places) reflected in UI guidance or validation messaging? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §Functional Requirements] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK003 Are UI requirements defined for snapping behavior messaging when coordinates fall between parcels? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Are the coordinate range requirements stated clearly enough for user-facing validation messages? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Are "Estimate Property Value" entry action and coordinate prompt labels specified consistently and unambiguously? [Ambiguity, Spec §Main Flow]
- [ ] CHK006 Are success display requirements specific about format/placement of estimate and range? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK007 Do the success criteria and functional requirements align on the presence of estimate range and numeric constraints? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK008 Are partial-data warning requirements consistent across alternate flows and acceptance scenarios? [Consistency, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK009 Are requirements defined for the user correcting invalid coordinates and resubmitting within the same session? [Coverage, Spec §Alternate Flows]
- [x] CHK010 Are requirements defined for the user experience when coordinates are outside the supported boundary? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK011 Are accessibility requirements defined for keyboard navigation and error messaging in the coordinate form? [Gap] Note: Necessary (constitution UX consistency); /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.
